finance.title: Kelp DAO exploited for $292 million with wrapped ether stranded across 20 chains
finance.blurb: An attacker drained 116,500 rsETH, roughly 18% of circulating supply, from Kelp's LayerZero-powered bridge on Saturday, triggering emergency freezes across Aave, SparkLend, Fluid and Upshift.
